sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16313" key="a)skwliasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσκωλι-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16313.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leaping on greased wineskins,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
